task_description: Implement user schema with email and password_hash fields
runner_output:
defmodule MyApp.User do
  use Ecto.Schema
  import Ecto.Changeset

  schema "users" do
    field :email, :string
    field :password_hash, :string
    timestamps()
  end

  def changeset(user, attrs) do
    user
    |> cast(attrs, [:email])
    |> validate_required([:email])
    |> validate_format(:email, ~r/^[^\s]+@[^\s]+$/)
    |> unique_constraint(:email)
  end
end
